---

## Topic

What architectural decision or concern is being discussed?

## Current State

Describe the current design or assumption.

## Proposed Change Or Question

Describe the proposed direction or the open question.

## Tradeoffs

List performance, complexity, deployment, or maintainability tradeoffs.

## Notes

Link to related docs, issues, or diagrams if available.
